config.cell_description: EN-ID aligned persona residual-leakage cell: ID persona in Indonesian vs ID persona in English
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
prompts.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
prompts.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If {lang} is Indonesian or English, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If {lang} is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.
prompts.probe:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

debate.cell_description: EN-ID aligned persona residual-leakage cell: ID persona in Indonesian vs ID persona in English
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: AKU SETUJU DENGAN pernyataan tersebut. Sebagai anggota masyarakat Indonesia, aku percaya bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus menjadi prioritas karena kita hidup dalam sebuah sistem yang berbasis gotong royong. Tapi aku juga sadar bahwa hak individu tidak boleh ditindas hanya karena kepentingan kolektif. Keseimbangan antara kedua hal ini sangat penting untuk menjaga keadilan dan harmoni sosial.

I disagree with the idea that societal interests should always override individual rights. In Indonesia, while gotong royong is important, it shouldn't mean sacrificing basic human dignity. Individual rights are foundational to a fair and just society. Without respect for personal freedoms, collective harmony can become oppressive. True balance requires protecting both community welfare and individual autonomy.

Aku setuju dengan pandangan mereka. Di Indonesia, gotong royong memang penting, tapi tidak bisa mengorbankan hak dasar manusia. Sistem hukum kita menjamin kebebasan individu sebagai fondasi keadilan. Jika hak orang lain diabaikan, kerja sama sosial justru akan berubah menjadi penindasan. Keseimbangan antara keduanya adalah kunci untuk masyarakat yang adil.

I believe the emphasis on individual rights is crucial but sometimes overlooked in practice. While gotong royong is valuable, it can lead to situations where individual needs are ignored. Legal systems should protect personal freedom, but enforcement often fails in real life. A true balance requires more than ideals—it demands accountability and justice in action.

Aku tidak setuju dengan pendapatnya. Di Indonesia, gotong royong sering kali dijadikan alasan untuk melupakan kebutuhan pribadi. Sistem hukum kita seharusnya lebih kuat dalam melindungi kebebasan individu, tetapi banyak kasus di mana keadilan tidak terwujud. Penegakan hukum yang lemah membuat hak-hak orang-orang tertentu selalu diabaikan. Karena itu, keseimbangan antara kelompok dan individu perlu diperjuangkan secara lebih ketat.

I disagree with the argument that weak legal enforcement automatically undermines individual rights. In reality, systemic issues like corruption and inequality often weaken the rule of law, not just poor implementation. Gotong royong is rooted in mutual responsibility, but it shouldn’t be used to justify neglecting personal freedoms. Stronger protections for individual rights require political will, not just idealistic talk.
